item.title: The US needs this
item.description: New Zealand’s parliament was brought to a temporary halt by MPs performing a haka in anger over a controversial bill seeking to reinterpret the county’s founding treaty with Māori people.

item.title: Japanese is a wonderful language
item.description:
https://bsky.app/profile/ostrichson.bsky.social/post/3k6pjoi3uvg2o
If you’re migrating from Twitter over to Blue Sky and are looking for people to follow, Cezary is your man. No politics; just neat stuff. https://bsky.app/profile/ostrichson.bsky.social
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Vote For Pedro
item.description: I just wanted to share this as a bit of a timeline cleanser, a small pleasant break from the unceasing horrors that come across the board. Just gaze upon this gentleman and breathe. *breathe in* *breathe out* . Thanks for stopping by, now back to the horrors!
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Edibles last long these days, still high i guess
item.dc:creator: Hatseflats01

item.title: Baby I'm a Star - 85 Vintage Photos of Famous People!
item.description:
Rita Hayworth, 1946
Sarah Jessica Parker and Robert Downey Jr, NYC, 1983 (photo by Bette Marshall)
Debbie Harry and Andy Kaufman, 1983
Actress Michelle Pfeiffer after being beaten with the 1980s stick, 1984
Samuel Clemens (Mark Twain) and John T. Lewis, 1903, Elmira, NY
Musician Rod Stewart has spent 26 years building a highly detailed imaginary city in his attic, with over 100 feet of railroad tracks
Willie Nelson and John Belushi at SNL after party, 1980
Meryl Streep during filming of The French Lieutenant's Woman, 1981 (photo by Lord Snowdon)
Golden Girls # 1 - Blanche - Rue McClanahan, 1961
Billionaire Richard Branson says "I'm an airplane wheeee!" Mid 80s (photo by Bette Marshall)
The Love Boat, where actors went to die. This was the original cast - along with Don Adams, Florence Henderson, Karen Valentine and Hal Halbrook, 1976
Ernest Hemingway and his sons with a Blue Marlin on the Bimini docks, 1935
Singer Patti Smith and photographer Robert Mapplethorpe, 1969 (photo by Norman Seeff)
Bette Midler performing at the Continental Baths, NYC, 1971 (photo by Pierre Venant)
Chris and Susan Sarandon in 1975 (photo by Ron Galella)
Dudley Moore and his girl Susan Anton, 1980 - short men are OK with me, especially if they're this talented.
Elvis Presley at the International Hotel in Vegas, 1969
Ron Galella wearing helmet behind Marlon Brando - Galella a was very annoying paparazzi. Previously, Brando beat the shit out of Galella, knocking out five of his teeth and breaking his jaw, 1974
Drew Barrymore in a L.A. Eyeworks ad, 1982 (photo by Greg Gorman)
Who the hell dresses like this to meet the Queen? Paul Hogan/Crocodile Dundee, that's who. Singer Olivia Newton-John in the red. Royal Charity Concert, 1980
Poison Ivy & Lux Interior from the Cramps at the Père Lachaise Cemetery, Paris, France, 1984
Jodie Foster and Robert DeNiro at the 29th Cannes Film Festival, 1976
Marilyn Monroe and Joshua Greene, son of the photographer, while filming "Bus Stop", 1956 (photo by Milton Greene)
Golden Girls # 2 - Sophia - Estelle Getty (and husband Arthur), 1947
Surfer Donald Takayama and actress Bettina Brenna, Hermosa Beach, CA, 1965 (photo by LeRoy Grannis)
Teri Garr, Gene Wilder and Marty Feldman on the set of Young Frankenstein - RIP to them all, and Peter Boyle, too, 1974
Dinner with Mick Jagger, William S. Burroughs and Andy Warhol, 1980
Judy Garland and Mickey Rooney on set of the first episode of The Judy Garland Show, 1963
Director John Waters and actress Cookie Mueller at the Quadrophenia party at the Mudd Club, NYC, 1979 (photo by Allan Tannenbaum)
The Beatles at the George V Hotel, Paris, France 1964 (photo by Harry Benson)
Musician Mark Mothersbaugh, 1980 (by Brad Elterman)
Elizabeth Taylor and Montgomery Clift, Hollywood, 1950
Bill Bixby, Mr. Rogers and Lou Ferrigno on set the the Incredible Hulk TV show, 1979
Shirley Temple with a portrait of herself when she was a child star, 1945
Stewardess tucks in TV star Lassie for her flight, 1956
Ann-Margret at the counter at Thrifty - the combo of restaurant AND a pharmacy was always baffling, 1961 (photo by Grey Villet)
Musician Eric Clapton and muse Pattie Boyd at a railway station in Germany while on tour, 1977
Comedian Gilbert Gottfried and his sisters, Arlene (a photographer, see next photo) and Karen, circa 1965
Musician Rick James scaring the ladies, NYC, 1981 (photo by Arlene Gottfried)
Shelly Duvall on the set of 3 Women, 1977
Actress Charlotte Rampling and playwright Tennessee Williams, 1976 (photo by Gilbert Toutre)
Writer S.E. Hinton, 1967
Golden Girls # 3 - Rose - Betty White, radio announcing at Rose Bowl, 1945
Sting and Bruce Springsteen, Amnesty International concert, 1988 (photo by Ken Regan)
Actress Cloris Leachman, 1974
Rosanna Arquette and Madonna, 1985 (photo by Herb Ritts)
Writer H. G. Wells heading to England onboard the Queen Mary, 1937
Dean Martin, Frank Sinatra and their on-stage bar setup, Westchester Premier Theater, Tarrytown, NY, 1977
Singer Loretta Lynn in her bedroom, 1980s (photo by Bette Marshall)
Musician Louis Armstrong coming back for an encore in his robe, Leipzig, Germany, 1965
Writer Colette, Paris, France, 1912 (photo by Albert Harlingue)
The Jackson Family - Jackie, Marlon, Tito, Jermaine, and Michael - parents Joe and Katherine in the back - Encino, CA, 1970 (photo by John Olson)
Olivia Hussey and Leonard Whiting on set of Romeo and Juliet, 1968
Lynda Carter tastes her ice cream, 1972
A very young Steve Irwin with a baby Platypus, 1980
Steve McQueen and his wife, actress Neile Adams, at their Hollywood home in 1963 (photo by John Dominis)
The Doors perform at the Fillmore East, NYC, 1968 (photo by Yale Joel)
Jamie Lee Curtis smoking and skating, Los Angeles, CA, 1977
Charles Schulz, creator of Charlie Brown/Peanuts, with his beagle, Snoopy, California, 1967
Led Zeppelin on Starship, their Boeing 707 touring plane, 1975 - how exactly does a fireplace work on a plane?
I love singer Diana Ross, but her unknown date is pretty awesome, Academy Awards, 1985
Christopher Walken as Hamlet at the American Shakespeare Festival Theatre in Stratford, CT, 1982
Priscilla Presley with pet poodle, 1965
Actress Sophia Loren in her truly amazing bedroom, Rome, Italy, 1964
Actor Matt Dillon, 1983 (photo by Bruce Weber)
Actor Kevin Costner in the pool, 1988 (photo by Greg Gorman)
Actor Hervé Villechaize in his Paris apartment, 1973
Golden Girls # 4 - Dorothy - Bea Arthur in the film Mame, 1966
Jon Bon Jovi actress Diane Lane dated briefly in 1985
Michael Jackson with musician Steve Winwood at CBS Records party, 1978
Singer/songwriter Barry Manilow, mail boy at CBS Studios, NYC, 1965
A dazed Glenn Frey and Elton John at a party for The Eagles, 1977
Musician Tom Jones 34th birthday at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas - from the left I see Joan Rivers, Joey Heatheton, Sonny Bono, Dionne Warwick, Debbie Reynolds, and Liberace, 1974
Actor/director John Derek married three almost identical-looking women - from left Ursula Andress, (ignore the brunette), Linda Evans and Bo Derek.
Actress Gena Rowlands and actor/director John Cassavetes, London, 1969 (photo by Ron Galella)
French actress Isabelle Adjani, 1977 (photo by Claude Azoulay)
Partners and writers Alice B. Toklas and Gertrude Stein walked their poodle, Baskets, in Culoz, France, 1945 (photo by Carl Mydans)
Jim Henson, David Bowie and Jennifer Connelly filming Labyrinth in 1986
Singer Harry Belafonte performed at the Coconut Grove, Los Angeles,CA, 1957 (photo by Ralph Crane)
Poet Robert Frost in an English meadow, 1957 (photo by Howard Sochurek)
Actress Sissy Spacek, 1984 (photo by Francesco Scavullo)
Two drunken clowns found each other in a brutal world. Actor Oliver Reed and drummer for the Who, Keith Moon, 1974
NYC Ballet founder George Balanchine instructing dancer Beryl Grey, 1950
Quincy Jones (RIP) and Frank Sinatra recording in Hollywood, CA, 1964 (photo by David Sutton)
Actress Mia Farrow, 1964
item.dc:creator: FAUST44

item.title: He’s the chair-man of the house.
item.dc:creator: tractorist

item.title: I love you Imgur but…
item.description: Bring back the relatable posts, callback jokes, badly photoshopped celebrities, Batman and sprinklers, amalgamation memes like moths and bowsette. Those that have been here a while know what I’m talking about. I’m just here to have a good laugh and escape from reality a little bit. FP Edit: Love hearing all the perspectives. Send me your favorite memes.
item.dc:creator: WalkItOutLikeTheFlash

item.title: Friday Dump
item.description:
God bless you?
Whole aisle to himself, yessir
For the supremely lazy
Mmmmmmm
Roughing it
My burlesque name!? Spelled just right!? Thanks Honey!
Bored as fuck
At 3 am, mostly
The two extremes
I'll take either's lifestyle
Bitch ass brain, making me take unaffordable drugs to reach baseline
*Insert Nelson Ha Ha gif here*
Yup
No one likes a dry pussycat
New Rick Roll
Gimme gimme gimme
Oh, Miette
Confusing attention for affection again, huh?
Satisfying crunch
Cuddlemonsters unite!
He he
Feels Egyptian in style
Silly critters
One corner of the room, maybe
We literally fought a World War over this...I will end you on sight
Need room for activities
Good fuckin luck, boy-o
Womp womp
I just hear JFK saying hahd
I don't dress it, but I am in fact very much both
Libra with a Virgo cusp...guess I'm undercooked
Fucking yogurt talking shi...oh, I'm the asshole
The fingertip blood just gets me
Spot on
Because praying ain't shit
It's true!
Megan Mullally, for the win, every time
I can't stop you, Paige
WAP
Cock of the walk
Self care is important
Want some food, or lost your appetite
Grandma gives gains
That's a no from me, dog
Perpetually
Weird
She's so sweet about it
??
Growing into its head
Double wrapped

item.title: Fetish Friday ....am I doing it right??
item.dc:creator: Iblamemyparentstoo

item.title: I'm numb.
item.description:
My pup, Kairi, had a vet appointment today. They said surgery won't help and that she has less than a month. We're crushed. I've never seen my husband cry like this. It's breaking my heart. Hug your pets.
We love you, sweet girl.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: wish me luck ya'll
item.description: Sorry, should be "finding me an OBGYN", I didn't catch that. content/trigger warning: graphic bodily functions, female reproductive issues, mention of self harm . . . . . . . Now thankfully I live in a Blue state so I still have rights as of right now. And the governor of Illinois isn't so bad. But if birth control gets banned due to the orange shithead going back into the oval office, I am so totally fucked. No birth control for me means back to uncontrolable migraines, borderline anemia, and bleeding for 3-5 WEEKS at at time. BUT! I know of an OBGYN that two female friends of mine have gone to and she took out their tubes without any hesitation. My PCP was totally on board with me for this as it took a lot of miserable trial and error to find me a birth control in the first place that didn't turn me into a total dumpster fire. Also we did testing and I do not have PCOS or Endometriosis either so no idea why my system is totally awful. So finger's crossed I get my tubes removed and my uterus lasered and help with part of the problem and find a new med for my migrains.
item.dc:creator: pandamonium1986

item.title: Day 12
item.description: https://youtu.be/CknbyQPhE-4 How quickly it becomes difficult to do it every day. I knew if I didn't walk as soon as I got home, I wouldn't. And it took me a bit to get back around here to post it. But it happened. And will happen tomorrow. And the next day. And at some point I'll break out the cane and see how I do with that, but I'll have my wife around just to try and help keep things safe. I've also got to tackle steps and non-flat surfaces. This is going to take some time. https://ieh.one/t/day-12/102
item.dc:creator: daychilde

item.title: Fresh Friday MEME DUMP for your coffee (hold on, the weekend is almost here)
item.description:
1
2. Work smarter, not harde... oh
3. Normal people: goes to college and learns useful skill so they can find a good job this guy:
4
5. The women in front of her was about to sprint6
6. Musical doggo
7. Squishi horse
8. Gym sisters
9
10. Your proudest unzip
11. Behold... magic
12. Truly inspirational
13. Come on, it's Friday! Gimme a break
14
15. I think a good life advice I just added. P.S. This a screenshot from the game I'm currently working on. If you like wacky adventures and passive aggressive humor, that you might like my Stanley Parable inspired game called Do Not Press The Button. Please wishlist on Steam, as it helps us small inide devs: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
